title: The Clima-Tact Starts to Make Sense
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on the clima-tact starts to make sense, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Clima-Tact Starts to Make Sense. Nami is pushed into a dangerous fight where every mistake with the Clima-Tact could kill her. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Ms. Doublefinger,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: "I'll deal with him,"

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: That's what you're gonna say, right?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Do as you wish.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Well then,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: I guess that leaves me with the girl...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: OH CRAP! Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...She's not here.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Weapon Modifica- Tion?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yes! A new weapon for me!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I know I'm no real fighter, though I do have a good sense of style... And I'm cute...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: The heck are you goin' on about? A

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I just want a strong- enough weapon so that I won't be a hindrance to others... Especially for the upcoming battle...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: For Vivi's sake,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I want to be able to fight with my own to hands as well!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You of all people can understand how I feel, right, Usopp!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: ...But you know, it won't be long before we arrive at Alabasta.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Oh... Yeah, I guess you can't just expect to become stronger that easily...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sorry for asking...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Wait just a second!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Are you implying that there's a task on this mortal realm,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Impossible for even Usopp the Great...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then you'll make one for me!? Thank you so much, Usopp! I love you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now, about the costs for the materials.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Thank you sooo much!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Uhh, weapons don't come free, y'know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then I'll leave it to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Uhh...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That's right... just what am I doing!? Running and hiding from place to place... didn't I make my mind up to fight!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: I won't let the Baroque Works do as they wish with this country any longer!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It doesn't seem like she was able to stop the rebels at the city gates...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I wonder if she and the others are fine...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: No! Now's not the time to worry.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm going to give it my best shot!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Even I can take down a single woman!

summary: This part develops the clima-tact starts to make sense and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
